title: veronica velutina
intro: Veronica velutina, also known as the Lamb's Tongue or Velvet Veronica, is a flowering plant species in the plantain family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Veronica velutina is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
